'''Kiva''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Its indigenous [[Kivan]] people were wiped out by [[Project Starscream]], to the utter horror of [[Shi'ido]] anthropologist [[Mammon Hoole]]. The only remnants of the people were shadowy wraiths.

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Galaxy of Fear: Army of Terror]]'' {{1st}}
